title: CPE Unit 1 Syllabus - Spring 2026 Cohort
description: Course syllabus including schedule, grading policy, APC competency areas assessed, and verbatim submission guidelines. Read before your first supervision session.

title: Verbatim Writing Template
description: Standard verbatim format used at Bluff City Medical Center. Includes pre-encounter feelings, verbatim dialogue, feelings during encounter, theological reflection, and supervisor feedback columns.

title: APC Standards of Practice - Board Certification Reference
description: Association of Professional Chaplains Standards of Practice and Common Qualifications and Competencies for Professional Chaplains. Key reference for your competency portfolio submissions.

title: Recommended Reading: Henri Nouwen - The Wounded Healer
description: Foundational text for Unit 1. Focus on chapters 2 and 4 for your theology of presence essay. Copies available through Memphis Divinity School library.

title: CPE Unit 2 Syllabus - Spring 2026 Cohort
description: Unit 2 syllabus covering oncology, ICU, and palliative care rotation requirements. Includes competency areas 6-10 and portfolio submission guidelines.

title: Palliative Care Chaplaincy: ACPE Resource Guide
description: ACPE-curated resource guide on chaplaincy in palliative and end-of-life care settings. Includes frameworks for goals-of-care conversations and grief ministry competencies.

title: Family Systems Genogram Tutorial
description: Step-by-step guide to completing a family systems genogram for the cw_204 case study assignment. Includes symbol key and completed model (de-identified).

title: Memphis Grief Support Resources - Community Directory
description: Reference list of grief support organizations in Memphis and Shelby County. Includes GriefShare locations, Mid-South Grief Center, Hospice of Memphis, and faith community contacts. Updated December 2025.

title: Morning Reflections - Show Production Guide 2026
description: Internal production guide for Morning Reflections with Rebecca on WGSP 1490 AM. Covers segment structure, timing sheet, guest protocol, sponsor read placement, and Audacity export standards. Prepared by TJ Jackson.

title: Sponsor Underwriting Guidelines - FCC Reference
description: FCC rules for nonprofit public radio underwriting acknowledgments. Explains what language is permitted and what constitutes a prohibited commercial endorsement. Required reading before cw_304.

title: Audacity Quick-Start Guide - Audio Editing Basics
description: Quick-start tutorial for Audacity covering import, noise reduction, normalization to -3 dB, and MP3 export at 320 kbps. Use this alongside cw_305. Prepared by TJ Jackson, WGSP.

title: Raw Recording Sample - cw_305 Source File
description: Raw recording clip (approximately 8 minutes, WAV format) for use in the cw_305 Audacity editing assignment. Download from Drive - do not stream. File is labeled mrr_raw_sample_mar2026.wav.

title: Congregational Care Training Syllabus 2025-2026
description: Full program syllabus for the Grace Community Church Lay Pastoral Care Training. Includes session dates, topics, assignment schedule, and facilitator contact information.

title: Hospital Visitation Guidelines - Grace Community Church
description: Practical guidelines for lay care visitors making hospital visits: what to bring, what to say, how long to stay, when to call the family, and when to notify pastoral leadership. Reviewed by Rebecca Price.

title: Fall 2025 CPE Cohort - Archived Portfolios and Evaluations
description: Archived folder containing completed competency portfolios, supervisor evaluation forms, and APC competency area scoring for Fall 2025 residents. Access restricted to current residents and Dr. Lorraine Vickers.
